title: BEM-919 worker request
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM919_FULL_SYSTEM_WORKING_PROTOCOL_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-919 FULL SYSTEM WORKING PROTOCOL REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> Worker -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: prepare an updated full-system protocol that analyzes protocol v1.7, real implementation status, Claude audit findings and operator remarks, then defines a practical roadmap to make the whole system working.
Operator correction:
- Do not produce another Telegram-only protocol.
- Telegram is only one part of the full system.
- The goal is to evolve the whole system to a working state.
Required analysis:
1. Protocol v1.7 intent and what was actually implemented.
2. What is real working baseline now: registries, rules, architecture canon, dispatch queue, consumers, object prompts/runners, proof policy, pilot scaffold, Telegram/Deno service endpoints.
3. What remains not fully working: commit_sha proof, real CI proof, always-on/production consumer model, full object lifecycle, complete Telegram operator workflow, report delivery, stale/legacy component cleanup, E2E Telegram proof, Claude re-audit.
4. Claude audit findings must be included as mandatory gaps, not ignored.
5. Operator remarks must be included: use existing Telegram mechanism; Telegram routes through General Director OBJ-GD-001 / EL-CUR-GD-001; reports default period 1 hour and follow canon; seven components must be classified as active/support/legacy/gated/archive; no Telegram-only focus.
Required protocol output:
- Unified updated protocol for full system, not standalone Telegram.
- Component status table.
- Done / partially done / not done table.
- Roadmap with BEM tasks, owners, acceptance criteria, proof and operator gates.
- Clearly separate autonomous work from operator-gated work.
- State that BEM-923 or equivalent gate covers production token/secrets/webhook/schedule/daemon decisions.
Expected roadmap themes:
- BEM-920 component inventory and SSOT freeze.
- BEM-921 proof and CI/Git release evidence.
- BEM-922 Telegram operator workflow using existing webhook through General Director.
- BEM-923 operator gate for production Telegram/secrets/schedule/daemon.
- BEM-924 dispatch queue and consumer lifecycle.
- BEM-925 object runner lifecycle GD/DIR/Worker.
- BEM-926 event log, managed channel and report pipeline.
- BEM-927 E2E tests from Telegram command to completed task and canonical report.
- BEM-928 Claude re-audit package.
Worker must assess coherence and executability.
Expected status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
